_comment: Workspace settings for the-gooning-company (router). Orchestrator merges workspaces/_shared/mcp.json in at launch; DO NOT copy that here.

model._comment: TODO(glue): set provider/model. Keep this OUT of git if provider config is sensitive. Prefer env vars resolved at launch time.

permissions._comment: path_rules restrict where the agent may read/write. Router should be able to read roadmap + every god.md (observability), but should NOT mutate roadmap.

tools._comment: TODO(glue): enable SendMessage + any router.* MCP tools. Domain tools (product.*, marketing.*, finance.*) are NOT exposed here.
